SYS:HUNTER
CLASSIFICATION: OPERATIVE ACCESS
Mission Divisions Archive Enlist
SYSTEMATIC YIELD SALVATION

SYS:
HUNTER

HUNTER DIVISION

CONSTRUCTION  /  TIMELINE STABILITY: 73%  /  PRIMARY THREAT: █████████████

A Roblox myth hunting group with a military twist.
We explore creepy games, investigate weird entities, run ops together,
and look pretty cool doing it.

ENLIST NOW VIEW DIVISIONS
PRIORITY ALERT: WYSTERIAN RELIC ACTIVITY DETECTED — ECHO DIVISION ON STANDBY RELAY-03 "DARK HUNTER" STABILIZATION: IN PROGRESS — BRIDGE DIVISION COORDINATING TIMELINE INTEGRITY: 73% — MONITOR FOR FRACTURE INDICATORS PRIORITY ALERT: CARIDA SECURITY SWEEP — VERDANT ABYSS SECTOR CLEARED EXCEL-1 CONTAINMENT: THREE ENTITIES SECURED — PHOENIX REHABILITATION INTAKE PENDING PROJECT RELAY ALLIANCE CONFIRMED — GUARDIAN [RELAY-05] COMMAND ACTIVE SYS: HUNTER RECRUITMENT OPEN — ALL DIVISIONS ACCEPTING APPLICATIONS PRIORITY ALERT: WYSTERIAN RELIC ACTIVITY DETECTED — ECHO DIVISION ON STANDBY RELAY-03 "DARK HUNTER" STABILIZATION: IN PROGRESS — BRIDGE DIVISION COORDINATING TIMELINE INTEGRITY: 73% — MONITOR FOR FRACTURE INDICATORS PRIORITY ALERT: CARIDA SECURITY SWEEP — VERDANT ABYSS SECTOR CLEARED EXCEL-1 CONTAINMENT: THREE ENTITIES SECURED — PHOENIX REHABILITATION INTAKE PENDING PROJECT RELAY ALLIANCE CONFIRMED — GUARDIAN [RELAY-05] COMMAND ACTIVE SYS: HUNTER RECRUITMENT OPEN — ALL DIVISIONS ACCEPTING APPLICATIONS
// MISSION STATEMENT

THE CODE

SYS: Hunter is a Roblox myth hunting group with a military-themed structure. We explore anomalous games, track down platform myths, run group operations, and build out lore around our findings. Think tactical team meets paranormal investigation.


We're organized into divisions so everyone has a role that fits them — whether you want to be on the front line engaging myths, documenting everything you find, or making sure operations run smoothly.


We take the roleplay seriously enough to make it fun, but not so seriously that it stops being a game. Good vibes, cool lore, and the occasional genuinely unsettling myth encounter.

// DIRECTIVE — OPERATIVE HANDBOOK REF 1.3
I
We hunt what threatens existence.
II
We protect what sustains it.
III
We never become what we hunt.
// ORGANIZATIONAL STRUCTURE

DIVISIONS

SEVEN PRIMARY DIVISIONS + TWO SPECIAL ATTACHED UNITS.
EACH OPERATIVE IS ASSIGNED TO ONE PRIMARY DIVISION.

DIVISION ONE
VANGUARD
"The Edge of the Blade"

The ones who actually go in. Vanguard handles direct myth engagements and leads field operations. If there's something weird in a server, these are the guys heading straight for it.

DIVISION TWO
ARCHIVE
"What Is Remembered Cannot Be Repeated"

The group's paper trail. Archive documents every myth, encounter, and oddity we come across. If you love writing reports and building lore, this is your division.

DIVISION THREE
AEGIS
"The Shield That Never Shatters"

Defense and damage control. Aegis keeps an eye on the platform for new anomalies and makes sure ongoing operations don't go sideways. The quiet professionals.

DIVISION FIVE
BRIDGE
"Translation Is the First Weapon Against War"

Communication specialists. Bridge handles negotiations with non-hostile myths and coordinates between divisions. Great fit if you're more into talking than shooting.

DIVISION SIX
ECHO
"Some Battles Must Be Fought Before They Begin"

Intel and threat tracking. Echo monitors for new anomaly patterns and keeps tabs on priority targets. The group's early-warning system — run directly by Command.

DIVISION SEVEN
PHOENIX
"From Endings, Beginnings"

Recovery and support. When an op goes badly or a member needs a hand, Phoenix steps in. They also handle myth rehabilitation for entities that turn out to be more lost than hostile.

SPECIAL UNIT — ATTACHED
CARIDA
"The Line Between the Living and the Threat"

Personal security for Command-level personnel. Small, invite-only, and very good at their job. If you're protecting the Commander, you're Carida.

SPECIAL UNIT — ATTACHED
EXCEL-1
"Controlled. Secured. Neutralized."

Containment and extraction. When a myth needs handling carefully — or someone needs pulling out of a bad spot — Excel-1 gets the call. Also runs joint ops with Carida under Protocol THRESHOLD for high-value personnel extractions.

// DECLASSIFIED ARCHIVE

IN THEIR WORDS

SYS: Hunter runs on a lore foundation built around myths, timelines, and a cast of characters with their own histories. You don't need to know all of it to join — but it gives ops a lot more flavour.


These quotes are pulled straight from the group's story. The myths are real (in-universe). The characters are real (to us). The weird games? Definitely real.


Check in with Archive Division to get up to speed on current threats and ongoing investigations.

"I was built to kill gods. But somewhere along the way, I learned that dying for something is easy. Living for it? That's the real war."

— RYU HUNTER  /  FOUNDER, SYS: HUNTER  /  CLEARANCE: COMMANDER

"The myths aren't the monsters. Loneliness is. Fear is. We won't let them hurt the lost ones anymore."

— GUARDIAN [RELAY-05]  /  PROJECT RELAY COMMANDER  /  ALLY

"My mercy is a privilege. Remember that when you beg for it."

— NADIYA OF WYSTERIA  /  PRIORITY TARGET  /  THREAT LEVEL: OMEGA
// RECRUITMENT — OPEN

ENLIST

We're open to anyone who's into Roblox myth hunting and likes the idea of a military-structured group. You don't need experience — just a willingness to show up, participate, and not be weird about it.


New members start as Initiates for two weeks, then get a full Division assignment once they've joined an op or two. Pretty low-key process, we promise.



JOIN ON ROBLOX
01
Join the Group
Hit the join button on our Roblox group page. Someone from leadership will review it — usually pretty quick.
02
Quick Intake
A short chat in-game or on our comms server. Just tell us a bit about yourself and which division sounds interesting. No essay required.
03
Two-Week Initiate Period
Join at least one operation with a senior member. Get a feel for how we run things. Ask questions. It's pretty chill.
04
Full Member
Get your Division assignment and your rank. Now you're properly in. Go find some myths.
SYS:HUNTER
SYSTEMATIC YIELD SALVATION — HUNTER DIVISION
CLASSIFICATION: OPERATIVE ACCESS  |  ALL RECORDS CLASSIFIED BEYOND BLACK
FOUNDED BY RYU HUNTER  |  COMMAND: GUARDIAN [RELAY-05]
